title: US Markets Close Out a Strong Month With Gains

title: A.O. Smith leads S&P 500 gainers after better-than-expected earnings and upbeat guidance
text: A.O. Smith Corp.'s stock jumped 12% Tuesday to lead S&P 500 gainers after the maker of water-heating equipment and boilers blew past earnings estimates for the fourth quarter.

title: A.O. Smith (AOS) Q4 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
text: A.O. Smith (AOS) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 8.86% and 2.61%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Selecting Dividend Aristocrats Using SCHD Methodology - Slow And Steady
text: I propose leveraging the stock selection criteria from the underlying index of SCHD to build a portfolio with a subset of Dividend Aristocrats. I am tracking two portfolios built using this process and comparing the results to NOBL and SCHD.

title: Will North America Weakness Mar A. O. Smith's (AOS) Q4 Earnings?
text: A. O. Smith's (AOS) Q4 performance is likely to have been hurt by lower water heater volumes in the North America segment and high raw material costs.

title: A. O. Smith Can Continue Its Outperformance
text: The company generates 80-85% of the residential revenue from the replacement market, which is less cyclical and should limit the downside despite tough macros. The company's margin should benefit from the moderation in commodity prices, price hikes, and cost-saving actions.

title: A. O. Smith: Prepare To Buy This Fast-Growing Dividend Aristocrat
text: A. O. Smith is one of the few companies that can call itself a dividend aristocrat thanks to 30 consecutive annual dividend hikes. The company yields 2.0% and maintains double-digit annual dividend growth, backed by high and rising free cash flow and a very healthy balance sheet.

title: A. O. Smith to Hold Fourth Quarter Conference Call on January 31, 2023
